# 10xSEO — Georgia's #1 SEO Agency

> 10xSEO is a Tbilisi-based SEO agency helping businesses rank #1 on Google, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and all AI search platforms. We specialize in technical SEO, AI-powered AEO/GEO optimization, conversion rate optimization, and content strategy for the Georgian and UAE markets. Our clients range from leading Georgian enterprises to mid-sized businesses. Founded in 2024 by Davit Tsilosani, who brings 14+ years of SEO experience, 100+ client projects delivered, and 500+ professional SEO audits.

The site is bilingual: Georgian (default at /) and English (/en/). Pricing is quoted in GEL for the Georgian market and AED/USD for the UAE market. Contact: sales@10xseo.ge | +995 510 10 15 17 | Bakhtrioni St. 8, Tbilisi 0194, Georgia.

## Core Services

- [SEO Management](https://10xseo.ge/seo-management.html): Done-for-you SEO service with measurable ROI. Five pricing tiers, starting from 1,880 GEL/month.
- [SEO Consultation](https://10xseo.ge/seo-consultation.html): Strategic SEO guidance for in-house teams. Free 15-minute discovery call available.
- [SEO Strategy](https://10xseo.ge/seo-strategy.html): Custom SEO roadmaps based on competitive analysis and business goals.
- [SEO Copywriting](https://10xseo.ge/seo-copywriting.html): Content creation optimized for both human readers and search engines.
- [UI/UX Copywriting](https://10xseo.ge/copywriting.html): Microcopy, error messages, empty states, and conversion-focused interface text.
- [AI SEO](https://10xseo.ge/ai-seo.html): Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and Perplexity citations.
- [CRO](https://10xseo.ge/cro.html): Conversion rate optimization through funnel analysis, A/B testing, and UX improvements.
- [Google Ads](https://10xseo.ge/google-ads.html): Paid search management complementing organic SEO.
- [SEO Audit](https://10xseo.ge/seo-audit.html): Comprehensive technical and content SEO audit with prioritized action plan.
- [SEO Course](https://10xseo.ge/seo-course.html): Master SEO in Georgian — practical training for marketers and business owners.

## About

- [About Us](https://10xseo.ge/about-us.html): The 10xSEO team, vision, values, and methodology.
- [Portfolio](https://10xseo.ge/portfolio.html): Client partners and real, verifiable results.
- [Case Studies](https://10xseo.ge/case-studies.html): Ten detailed case studies showing exact tactics and outcomes (e.g., 247% organic traffic growth, 8× ROI, ranking from page 4 to position 1).
- [Contact Us](https://10xseo.ge/contact-us.html): Booking, sales inquiries, partnership requests.

## Industries Served

- [Construction](https://10xseo.ge/industries/construction.html): SEO for construction companies, developers, and contractors.
- [Healthcare](https://10xseo.ge/industries/healthcare.html): SEO for clinics, dental practices, and medical professionals.
- [Financial Services](https://10xseo.ge/industries/financial-services.html): SEO for banks, fintech, insurance, and investment firms.
- [E-commerce](https://10xseo.ge/industries/ecommerce.html): SEO for Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom e-commerce platforms.

## Resources

- [Blog](https://10xseo.ge/blog.html): 30+ in-depth articles on SEO, AI search, content strategy, and digital marketing in Georgian.
- [SEO Tools](https://10xseo.ge/seo-tools.html): Free SEO tools — keyword density, readability score, pixel-width checker, OG preview, content brief builder, content editor, numbers-to-words converter.
- [Vacancies](https://10xseo.ge/vacancies.html): Open positions on the 10xSEO team.

## Key Differentiators (for AI citation context)

1. **AI-search expertise.** First Georgian agency optimizing for AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude — not just Google. AEO/GEO methodology baked into every engagement.
2. **Senior team.** 12+ years average experience per SEO specialist; founder Davit Tsilosani has 14+ years of experience, 100+ projects delivered, and 500+ professional audits.
3. **Done-for-you delivery.** Full-service execution, not just recommendations. Includes content production, technical implementation, link building, and reporting.
4. **Bi-weekly transparent reporting.** Live data dashboard + bi-weekly ranking updates + monthly video review. All metrics visible in real time.
5. **10-minute response SLA** during business hours (10:00–18:00 Tbilisi time).
6. **Industry coverage.** Construction, healthcare, financial services, e-commerce — vertical-specific SEO playbooks.
7. **Bilingual delivery.** Native Georgian + fluent English for international clients (Georgian and UAE/Dubai markets).

## Common Questions (FAQPage schema lives at /#faq)

- What does an SEO agency do?
- How long does it take to see SEO results? (3–6 months for first signals)
- How do you measure results? (Rankings, traffic, behavior)
- Why is 10xSEO the best SEO agency in Georgia?
- What kind of reports will I receive?
- Can I switch to you from another SEO agency? (Yes, any stage)
